---
title: "🚀 Tasks"
format: html
---


As always, the data for this task is on moodle. Follow the instructions in [Submission via GitHub Pages](submission.qmd#sec-gh-pages) to create a new repo in the existing organization.


Redo you task from [last Week](#sec-min-ex), but further extend your features by using the approach described in [Adding Context](movement-II-adding-context.qmd#sec-adding-context). Add at least 2, to 3 features of your own.

Compare your results to the ones you got last week. Does your model perform better if context information is added?
